text:
Okay. Once upon a time, there was a little old lady who lived in a cottage near the woods.

Every morning, she would knit something sweet for the old lady next door. She was famous for her fluffy cakes.

One day, while out walking her dog, the little old lady stumbled across a giant blueberry field.

She picked lots and lots of blueberries and made herself a huge batch of pies.

She sent them out all over the town.

Afterwards, her health went downhill.

She started sleeping a lot.

One day, she woke up in bed.

Her dog was curled up at her feet.

She got up.

She went into the kitchen.

She sat down at the bench.

She pulled out a big bowlful of cookies.

She started poking around.

She found nothing.

No berries, no spices...

Her eyes widened.

Maybe... maybe there were no blueberries.

Maybe...

There were. On the windowsill.

She got out her old cookie dough cutter.

She picked
